channel.title: Admin Panel on IDPicker Docs
channel.description: Recent content in Admin Panel on IDPicker Docs

item.title: Admin Login and Dashboard
item.description:
Admin Login (Click-by-Click)

  1. Open the Admin dashboard login URL.
  2. Enter username or email.
  3. Enter password.
  4. Click Sign In.
  5. Wait for redirect to dashboard.

Expected result:

  • Admin auth cookie is set.
  • Dashboard loads KPI cards and recent activity.

Password Reset

  1. Open reset-password route.
  2. Enter account email.
  3. Submit reset request.
  4. Open reset link from inbox.
  5. Set new password.
  6. Log in again.

Dashboard First Checks

  1. Confirm KPI cards load.
  2. Check recent assessments table.
  3. Review registration trend chart.
  4. Verify system activity panel updates.

Token Usage and Activity

  1. Open token usage section.
  2. Select date range/interval.
  3. Review input/output token trends.
  4. Cross-check spikes with logs module.

Common Questions

Q: Login works but dashboard widgets are empty. A: Wait for API load and refresh once; verify API base URL and token validity.

item.title: User and Organization Management
item.description:
Student Management

  1. Open Student Management.
  2. Use search by name/email.
  3. Apply filters and sorting.
  4. Expand student row for full detail.
  5. Review verification, premium, and activity counters.
  6. Use delete action only after confirmation review.

Parent Management

  1. Open Parent Management.
  2. Search/filter parents.
  3. Open parent detail.
  4. Edit parent profile fields if needed.
  5. Link parent to student or unlink relationship.
  6. Send invite when required.

Organization Management

  1. Open Organization Management.
  2. Click Create Organization.
  3. Fill organization profile and primary admin details.
  4. Save and verify organization appears in list.
  5. Edit, export, or delete based on policy.

Safety Checklist Before Deletion

  1. Confirm no active dependencies.
  2. Export relevant records if needed.
  3. Use confirmation dialogs carefully.

Common Questions

Q: Parent linked but student still missing. A: Refresh relation list and verify student account exists in same environment.

item.title: Admin and Subadmin Management
item.description:
Create Admin User

  1. Open Admin Management.
  2. Click Add Admin.
  3. Fill identity fields (email, username, first/last name).
  4. Set temporary password.
  5. Choose role.
  6. Save and confirm creation.

Edit Admin Profile

  1. Open admin row detail.
  2. Update identity fields.
  3. Save updates.
  4. Confirm list refresh reflects changes.

Permission Assignment

  1. Open permission panel for target admin.
  2. Set feature scopes per module:
    • write
    • read
    • none
  3. Set organization-level scope where applicable.
  4. Save permissions.
  5. Ask user to relogin if permissions do not refresh immediately.

Subadmin Self View

  1. Open Subadmin page.
  2. Review effective permission summary.
  3. Use refresh permissions action to sync latest grants.

Common Questions

Q: Admin can see module but cannot perform action. A: Verify action-level permission is write, not read.

item.title: Assessments and Forms
item.description:
Assessments Module

  1. Open Assessments.
  2. Review existing assessments.
  3. Click Create Assessment.
  4. Add title and description.
  5. Add questions and select question types.
  6. Configure options and required fields.
  7. Save and test.

Supported assessment question patterns include rating, multiple choice, short answer, and yes/no.

Assessment Upload Flow

  1. Open Upload action.
  2. Select CSV/XLSX file.
  3. Validate import preview/errors.
  4. Confirm import.

Forms Module

  1. Open Forms list.
  2. Create or open existing form.
  3. Edit form structure/content.
  4. Save draft or publish.
  5. Open responses view to review submissions.
  6. Open individual response detail when needed.

Common Questions

Q: Imported assessment has broken options. A: Verify file schema and option label columns before import.

item.title: Prompts, Translations, and Content
item.description:
Prompts Management

  1. Open Prompts.
  2. Select category.
  3. Select subcategory.
  4. Open target prompt template.
  5. Edit text in editor.
  6. Validate syntax.
  7. Save and verify version update.

Prompt Quality Checks

  1. Confirm variable placeholders are valid.
  2. Review lint/syntax errors.
  3. Review diff between previous and current versions.

Translations Management

  1. Open Translations.
  2. Filter by namespace and locale.
  3. Search by key or value.
  4. Edit existing translation.
  5. Create missing translation keys where needed.
  6. Save and validate in target UI route.

Mentor Personality and Interests

  1. Open Mentor Personality.
  2. Edit localized mentor fields and expertise arrays.
  3. Save and verify list updates.
  4. Open Interests module.
  5. Review status queue and update where allowed.

Common Questions

Q: Prompt save fails with template error. A: Fix invalid placeholder/template syntax and retry.

item.title: Support, Notifications, and Approvals
item.description:
Support Tickets

  1. Open Support Tickets.
  2. Filter by status and priority.
  3. Open ticket detail.
  4. Update status.
  5. Add resolution message.
  6. Save and verify status transition.

Notifications

  1. Open Notifications.
  2. Click Create Notification.
  3. Enter title and message.
  4. Select target type (all, users, groups).
  5. Select recipients if needed.
  6. Send and verify history entry.

Demo Approvals and Admission Criteria

  1. Open Demo Approvals queue.
  2. Review request details.
  3. Approve or reject with notes where required.
  4. Open Admission Criteria module.
  5. Edit or review criteria entries.
  6. Save and verify publishing/active state.

Common Questions

Q: Ticket transitions fail silently. A: Reopen ticket and check required resolution fields before save.

item.title: System Monitoring and Governance
item.description:
Status Module

  1. Open Status page.
  2. Review service health blocks.
  3. Identify degraded components.
  4. Correlate with recent alerts.

Realtime Logs

  1. Open Realtime Logs.
  2. Start live stream view.
  3. Filter by level/source if available.
  4. Track suspicious error bursts.

Free-Use Management

  1. Open Free Use Management.
  2. Review current quota/limit values.
  3. Update limits according to policy.
  4. Save and verify effect on applicable feature gates.

Certificates and Application Documents

  1. Open Certificates.
  2. Review issuance queue/status.
  3. Open Application Documents.
  4. Review document validations and statuses.
  5. Apply review decisions and notes.

Common Questions

Q: Logs show spikes but dashboard looks normal. A: Compare time windows and cross-check token usage metrics.
